overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting an ancient Mediterranean shipyard. The player character walks through a sunny dock area with wooden ships under construction, stone warehouses with classical columns, and scattered construction materials, eventually approaching a worker in an enclosed courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden ship construction dock with scaffolding

events.description: steps off wooden platform onto dirt and gravel ground
passes large sandbag piles and wooden ship hull becomes prominent

agents.ego_description: walking through active shipyard construction area, passing wooden support posts and partially built vessels

notable_agents.action: two workers sitting on wooden blocks near the ship hull

entered.detail: large wooden vessel under construction with red painted hull sections
tall wooden posts with red and white banners attached
stacks of brown canvas sandbags piled near the dock
weathered wooden dock planks at the starting position

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wooden dock platform in a sunny shipyard. The camera moves forward past tall wooden pillars with banners, approaching a large red-hulled ship under construction. Two workers sit near the vessel as the ground transitions from wooden planks to dirt and gravel.

scene_state.functional_zone: open shipyard storage area with scattered carts and materials

events.description: moving from enclosed dock area into wider open shipyard with mountain views
slight left turn toward the large stone colonnade building

agents.ego_description: traversing open shipyard with scattered construction materials and large wooden carts

notable_agents.action: worker in tunic walking toward camera through the shipyard

entered.detail: large wooden wheeled carts with heavy timber loads
two-story stone buildings with dark tiled roofs
distant rocky mountains visible beyond the shipyard

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide shipyard with cobblestone ground and scattered wooden carts. Mountains rise in the background as the character walks past large storage buildings. A worker approaches from the distance while the camera moves toward a grand stone colonnade.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront colonnade with classical stone columns

events.description: approaching large stone building with classical columns and red banners
passing bright burning fire brazier casting dynamic shadows from columns

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront past a large columned building with red banners, approaching a worker near a fire pit

notable_agents.action: worker walking ahead toward the colonnade entrance

entered.detail: long stone building with rows of classical columns and red decorative banners
large metal bowl with bright orange flames burning near the building entrance
bright blue Mediterranean water visible beyond the colonnade
long red fabric banners with white geometric patterns hanging between columns

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an impressive stone colonnade with classical architecture and red banners. A bright fire burns in a brazier near the entrance as the blue sea sparkles in the background. The camera moves along the building facade, passing from bright sunlight into the shadow of the columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed workshop courtyard with scaffolding and lumber

events.description: turning right into narrow courtyard between stone buildings with construction scaffolding
passing under canvas awning into more enclosed workshop area

agents.ego_description: turning into a narrow courtyard with wooden scaffolding and workers carrying lumber

notable_agents.action: worker carrying wooden plank across the courtyard

entered.detail: tall stone walls enclosing the workshop area
rough wooden support structures and beams
tattered beige canvas stretched between poles for shade
piles of wooden planks and beams stacked for construction

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the waterfront, the scene enters a narrow courtyard enclosed by stone walls. Wooden scaffolding and canvas awnings create shade over the work area. Several workers move through the space carrying materials as the camera navigates between lumber piles and construction debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner workshop courtyard with wood carving station

events.description: slowing down while approaching woodworker at carving station
approaching NPC to interact with woodworker carving a post

agents.ego_description: approaching a woodworker who is actively carving a wooden post with a chisel and hammer

notable_agents.action: woodworker repeatedly striking a chisel to shape a tall wooden post

entered.detail: tall wooden post secured upright with chisel marks and wood shavings around base
interior stone wall of the workshop building with wooden doorways

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a shaded inner courtyard where a woodworker is actively carving a tall wooden post. The character approaches the worker, who is rhythmically striking a chisel with a hammer. The area is enclosed by stone walls with scattered wood shavings on the ground, creating an intimate workshop atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sun-drenched ancient shipyard that gradually transitions from open docks into a shaded, intimate workshop. It begins on a wooden platform moving past banners toward a large red-hulled ship, where the ground shifts from planks to dirt and gravel. As the camera advances, the scene opens into a wide cobblestone area with storage buildings and distant mountains before gliding toward a grand stone colonnade with burning braziers and a sparkling blue sea in the background. The perspective then moves from the bright sunlight of the facade into the shadows of a narrow courtyard enclosed by stone walls, navigating through scaffolding and canvas awnings. Finally, the camera enters a secluded inner courtyard, passing piles of lumber and wood shavings to approach a woodworker carving a tall post.
